base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_menus — a ui from 1997 final fantasy tactics. All menus — job-change + skill-buy + equipment + brave/faith stats + zodiac compatibility + bird-talk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All menus — job-change + skill-buy + equipment + brave/faith stats + zodiac compatibility + bird-talk
